# md4ai: AI-Friendly Rich Markdown

md4ai is a library that extends standard markdown with rich UI components (KPIs, Charts, Steps, etc.) designed for LLM output density and interactive React rendering.

## Core Documentation
- [Quickstart](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/docs.html#quickstart): Installation and basic setup for React.
- [Prompting Guide](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/docs.html#prompting): How to teach models to use the syntax.
- [Bridges](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/docs.html#bridges): Creating custom @directives for your own components.
- [Streaming](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/docs.html#streaming): Handling partial markdown blocks without flickering.

## Syntax Reference
- [Callouts](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/docs.html#callouts): GitHub-style alerts (> [!NOTE]).
- [Charts](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/docs.html#charts): Bar, line, and pie charts via JSON fences.
- [KPI Metrics](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/docs.html#kpi-metrics): High-density @kpi cards for stats.
- [Steps](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/docs.html#steps): Workflow and timeline components.
- [Layout](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/docs.html#layout): Multi-column markdown rendering.
- [Buttons & Inputs](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/docs.html#buttons): Interactive elements in markdown.

## Full Documentation
- [Full Reference](https://md4ai.github.io/md4ai/llms-full.txt): A single file containing all documentation for full context injection.
